scope: Phase B pre-registered gate evidence (plan 2026-07-13, Phase B revised 2026-07-16); measurements over pooled held-out test seasons 2023-25 unless noted

weekly_gate.verdict: PASSED all positions (coverage and both tails)

ruleset_diagnostics.rule: fit is PPR-exact; flag any ruleset position off by >0.05

clip_gate.rule: sampled weekly mass at the -5 clip < 1% per position; board 2025

season_coverage_gate.adjudication: copula activated per rule at iid stage; final QB/RB 0.006/0.023 under the 0.75 floor, within ~1 binomial SE (pool n 78/150); user accepted ship-as-is 2026-07-18 (tuning rho against the board backtest = test-set fitting, declined)

rank_metric_gate.rule: season MAE/Spearman/hit-rate degrade >2% rel vs A3 baseline -> stop and report
rank_metric_gate.adjudication: letter tripped on integer hit-count moves of 1-2 slots/76 (SE ~5.7%) and 2023 MAE +2.3%; MAE improved at the iid stage (-2.6/-2.2/+0.4) confirming the Session-2 diagnosis, the copula median shift traded it for season coverage; reported and user-accepted 2026-07-18

simulated_mean_vs_median.note: board 2025, all 616 players x 3 rulesets; season point estimate is the simulated MEDIAN (MAE-optimal); mean recorded per plan for the record
